candidates.text: An early Claude Mythos Preview snapshot we provided METR has a time horizon of more than 2x the next best model on their 80% success rate benchmark https://t.co/xOrewjvFIF https://t.co/DVUWVaubCg

~1,000 km later.

Unsolicited plug: continues to be the best hack I’ve ever found for motivating me “Eh, come on, why not one more mile.” on my morning constitutional. https://t.co/gp4C5neciL https://t.co/l84teizo7D

So we have 200+ speakers coming to SaaStr AI Annual next week.

The prior years, an (often grouchy) human spent hours and hours sending the calendar invites, and usually got 5%+ of them wrong, leading to endless back-and-forth after.

Last night, Claude Cowork just did it all in

13 years of SaaStr. Hundreds of events. Tens of thousands of founders helped. 

SaaStr AI Annual 2026 is the most important one we've ever done. May 12-14. SF Bay. 

See you next week. https://t.co/ohBGqATyfO
